TestCase z24Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Not enough elements to form a subarray, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: sort a random subarray ascending
    int start = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int end = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (start > end) {
        int tmp = start;
        start = end;
        end = tmp;
    }
    // Insertion sort on the subarray [start, end]
    for (int i = start + 1; i <= end; ++i) {
        int key = follow_case.a[i];
        int j = i - 1;
        while (j >= start && follow_case.a[j] > key) {
            follow_case.a[j + 1] = follow_case.a[j];
            j--;
        }
        follow_case.a[j + 1] = key;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
